title: Oberoi Realty Global Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Oberoi Realty Global Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Oberoi Realty Global Group are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Oberoi Realty Global Group:
Oberoi Realty Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oberoi Realty Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
